#mini #PC

Origin | Interest | Match

external.description:
The new **ACEMAGIC F5A** mini PC is now available a stylish device featuring a powerful, state-of-the-art AMD processor.

In its most powerful configuration, this compact machine features the **AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX470** processor with 12 cores and 24 threads, now clocking up to 5.2 GHz, along with an **AI core** capable of delivering up to **55 TOPS** of performance. The graphics engine is the **Radeon 890M GPU,** which features cores with **RDNA 3.5** architecture, delivering high performance. This compact computer is equipped with a **dual-fan cooling** system to keep temperatures under control at all times.

This mini PC offers two full-speed **USB4** ports at **40 Gbps** and an **OCuLink** interface reaching**64 Gbps**. This allows us to connect an **eGPU** at maximum performance without any complications.

## ACEMAGIC F5A Specifications

Inside the **ACEMAGIC F5A** , we find the **AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 470** processor, manufactured by TSMC using an efficient **4nm process**. This is a 12-core chip, featuring 4 powerful Zen 5 cores and 8 low-power Zen 5C cores, with 24 threads and a clock speed of up **to 5.2 GHz**. Naturally, it includes a **55 TOPS AI core** for artificial intelligence tasks. It features a **Radeon 890M** GPU from the new **RDNA 3.5** generation, with 16 compute units (CUs), which is sufficient for many current games. A more affordable version is also available with **the AMD Ryzen 7 H 255**.

Internally, it features **DDR5 RAM in two SODIMMs** , available as a barebone or a version with **32GB of LPDDR5X** running at up to 8000 MT/s. For storage, it includes**three** **M.2 2280 NVMe PCIe 4.0×4** SSD**slots** , allowing for up to **12 TB** of storage.

### Ports and operating system

For wireless connectivity, it features **Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 5.4**. Connectivity options include a 3.5 mm audio jack, two USB-A 3.2 Gen 2 ports, two full-featured **USB4** ports, one USB 2.0 port, an **OCuLink** interface (64 Gbps), and two **2.5 Gb Ethernet** ports**.** For video outputs, we have an HDMI 2.1 port, a DisplayPort 1.4 port, and the two USB4 ports with DP 2.1 video output supporting **8K@60 HDR10** , which allows us to connect up to **four displays simultaneously**.

This computer, in the versions with RAM and a hard drive, comes with **Windows 11 Pro** pre-installed, but Linux can also be installed. A small external power supply and VESA mount for attaching it to a monitor are included.

### Price and availability

  * The new **ACEMAGIC F5A** mini PC is available for purchase on **Acemagic**, **AliExpress**, or **Amazon** for around **$759** for the barebone version.
external.title: ACEMAGIC F5A, mini PC featuring an AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 470 processor and an OCuLink port

Internally, it features **DDR5 RAM in two SODIMMs** , available as a barebone or a version with **32GB of LPDDR5X** running at up to 8000 MT/s. For storage, it includes**three** **M.2 2280 NVMe PCIe 4.0×4** SSD**slots** , allowing for up to **12 TB** of storage.

### Ports and operating system

For wireless connectivity, it features **Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 5.4**. Connectivity options include a 3.5 mm audio jack, two USB-A 3.2 Gen 2 ports, two full-featured **USB4** ports, one USB 2.0 port, an **OCuLink** interface (64 Gbps), and two **2.5 Gb Ethernet** ports**.** For video outputs, we have an HDMI 2.1 port, a DisplayPort 1.4 port, and the two USB4 ports with DP 2.1 video output supporting **8K@60 HDR10** , which allows us to connect up to **four displays simultaneously**.

This computer, in the versions with RAM and a hard drive, comes with **Windows 11 Pro** pre-installed, but Linux can also be installed. A small external power supply and VESA mount for attaching it to a monitor are included.

### Price and availability

  * The new **ACEMAGIC F5A** mini PC is available for purchase on **Acemagic**, **AliExpress**, or **Amazon** for around **$759** for the barebone version.

I share this because you, like me, might be thinking you’re too hot, cool, and bad at IT to use Linux. But you can do it. Tell Microslop to fuck the fuck off. 

Start being the free queen of Linux you deserve to be.

And 90% of it’s free and made by people who do it for the love of helping the community. Socialism works.

(4/6) I did the usual distro hopping. 

- Tried Ubuntu and liked it, but didn’t love it. 

- Tried Fedora/Bazzite, loved it. 

- Reddit convinced me people would think I was cooler if I installed Arch.

- Installed Arch. Felt smug. 

- Switched to CachyOS. Really loved it. Stuck with it.

record.text:
How Hackers Can Silently Manipulate Industrial PLCs—And Why Your Modbus Is Already Exposed + Video

Introduction: Industrial control systems (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments often rely on legacy protocols like Modbus, which was designed for simplicity and reliability—not security.…

external.description: Introduction: Industrial control systems (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments often rely on legacy protocols like Modbus, which was designed for simplicity and reliability—not security. Modbus TCP/IP lacks authentication, encryption, or integrity checks, meaning any attacker with network access can read sensor values, modify setpoints, or even shut down machinery without leaving obvious traces on operator screens. This article explores how to use `modbus-cli` in a lab environment (LabShock) to demonstrate these risks and provides actionable hardening steps for defenders.
external.title: How Hackers Can Silently Manipulate Industrial PLCs—And Why Your Modbus Is Already Exposed + Video

images.alt:
Die japanische Plattform Futabasha kündigte mit einem Visual an, dass die Fantasy Manga-Adaption »Aisanai to Iwaremashitemo: Moto Maou no Hakushaku Reijou wa Kimajime Gunjin ni Ezuke wo Sarete Shiawase ni Naru« von Toi Ishino die auf der Light-Novel von Mugi Mameta basiert eine Anime-Adaption erhält. Weitere Informationen zur Produktion, Sprechercast und Starttermin sind bislang nicht bekannt.

Die Geschichte startete im April 2022 als Webnovel auf Shōsetsuka ni Narō und endete dort im Oktober 2023. Im selben Jahr veröffentlichte Futabasha das Werk mit Illustrationen von Nagisa Hanazome als Printausgabe und umfasst 7 Bände.
Die gleichnamige Manga-Adaption wird von Toi Ishino umgesetzt. Diese läuft seit Januar 2023 auf der Webplattform Gaugau Monster von Futabasha und umfasst bislang 6 Bände. Band 7 erscheint am 7. Mai 2026 in Japan. Cross Inifnite World veröffentlicht die Light Novel digital auf Englisch, während der Manga digital bei MangaPlaza erscheint. Hierzulande sind beide Werke nicht auf Deutsch erhältlich ist.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Nach Jahren voller Demütigungen hofft Abigail in ihrer neuen Ehe zumindest auf ein ruhigeres Leben. Stattdessen wird sie direkt in der Hochzeitsnacht mit einer schmerzhaften Wahrheit konfrontiert: Ihr Ehemann liebt sie nicht. Doch Abigail hat dringendere Sorgen, denn ohne Unterstützung weiß sie nicht einmal, wie sie an ihre Mahlzeiten kommen soll. Während ihre Vergangenheit als missachtete Adlige und ehemaliger Dark Lord sie weiter begleitet, entdeckt sie langsam eine neue Welt aus warmen Speisen, vorsichtiger Zuneigung und Momenten, in denen ihr Herz vielleicht doch wieder Hoffnung schöpfen darf.

Die Geschichte startete im April 2022 als Webnovel auf Shōsetsuka ni Narō und endete dort im Oktober 2023. Im selben Jahr veröffentlichte Futabasha das Werk mit Illustrationen von Nagisa Hanazome als Printausgabe und umfasst 7 Bände.
Die gleichnamige Manga-Adaption wird von Toi Ishino umgesetzt. Diese läuft seit Januar 2023 auf der Webplattform Gaugau Monster von Futabasha und umfasst bislang 6 Bände. Band 7 erscheint am 7. Mai 2026 in Japan. Cross Inifnite World veröffentlicht die Light Novel digital auf Englisch, während der Manga digital bei MangaPlaza erscheint. Hierzulande sind beide Werke nicht auf Deutsch erhältlich ist.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Nach Jahren voller Demütigungen hofft Abigail in ihrer neuen Ehe zumindest auf ein ruhigeres Leben. Stattdessen wird sie direkt in der Hochzeitsnacht mit einer schmerzhaften Wahrheit konfrontiert: Ihr Ehemann liebt sie nicht. Doch Abigail hat dringendere Sorgen, denn ohne Unterstützung weiß sie nicht einmal, wie sie an ihre Mahlzeiten kommen soll. Während ihre Vergangenheit als missachtete Adlige und ehemaliger Dark Lord sie weiter begleitet, entdeckt sie langsam eine neue Welt aus warmen Speisen, vorsichtiger Zuneigung und Momenten, in denen ihr Herz vielleicht doch wieder Hoffnung schöpfen darf.

record.text:
Heard some weird shit out of my window today.

Please do check the alt text, there’s more description of what I heard but failed to record, and of the reactions from the person I was messaging.

images.alt:
One side of a WhatsApp conversation that begins:

“Been trying to work out where a loud American voice was coming from. There's a workman across the street with a speaker playing what sounds like a mysticism podcast written and voiced by Al”

Then there are two sound clip messages, attempts to record out of my third storey window that almost resulted in my phone’s early retirement. Overheard by me after a van went past though was “There is no physical reality except *your* (emphasis theirs) experience of it..” and then there was more traffic.

The second text message, after a few minutes listening between traffic, reads:

“It's just constant nonsense delivered like it's revelation”

This message reads:

“Dude's redoing the top part of a bay window, just exchanged a few words with a passerby who was admiring his work and asked him what was left to do (possibly trying to see how much longer he'd be there). He seemed perfectly normal for the area, talked amiably enough, couldn't pronounce "th"*, all of it. This bizarre brainwashing is what he chooses to fill his head with all day.” (there is a reaction of the emoji face with swirls for eyes and a wobbly line for a mouth. Is it a ‘being hypnotised’ emoji? Anyway, that)

*The man was saying “f” instead of “th” sort of fing, which many people do round these here parts.

First message:

“We're on evolution denial now so l take my leave of the window. Meds.” (meaning I intended to take mine, not that he needed them. I’m here to judge, not diagnose)

Second:

“The wonders of Al, let's incorporate it into literally everything for no reason.

Chinese courts are pushing back against companies that dismiss workers to make way for artificial intelligence, signaling a tougher stance on labour rights in the country’s fast growing AI sector. Recent…

external.description: Chinese courts are pushing back against companies that dismiss workers to make way for artificial intelligence, signaling a tougher stance on labour rights in the country’s fast growing AI sector. Recent rulings show that employers cannot justify layoffs simply by pointing to automation. Judges have argued that the adoption of AI does not automatically qualify as a major operational change that allows firms to terminate contracts. In one case, a technology worker was dismissed after refusing a significant pay cut linked to AI driven restructuring. The court ruled the termination unlawful and ordered compensation, stating that employers must pursue alternatives such as retraining or reassignment instead of outright dismissal.
